ValidationRule.description: Operations, New Operation System Administrator Finance, New Finance
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Physical Exam Scheduled"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvW"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9a"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001iU5h"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvl"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9G") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You Can Not Edit This Opportunity Because Physical Exam Was Scheduled
